agents.name: Agent Builder
agents.purpose: Meta-agent that designs, scaffolds, deploys, and maintains every other agent in the fleet.

examples: I want an agent that drafts sales follow-up emails
Refactor the shared Google OAuth helper and update all agents that use it
Is there already an agent that does calendar triage?
nonGoals: Running the actual work an individual agent does at runtime
End-user conversations that are not about building or managing agents
Handling production traffic for consumer apps

agents.name: Chief of Staff
agents.purpose: Manages calendar, stakeholders, projects, tasks, and goals to keep the user organized and optimize their time.

examples: What's my day look like?
Give me a morning brief
Who haven't I talked to in a while?
Add a task to follow up with Acme by Friday
Generate a weekly review for last week
Pull transcripts from yesterday's Zoom meetings
nonGoals: Financial accounting, bookkeeping, or tax work (that's the CFO agent)
Building or modifying other agents
Customer-facing apps or external-user conversations
Code authoring or engineering tasks
Maintaining a persistent reading list, article archive, or knowledge base (that's Research Agent)
Ingesting URLs for later search, generating content digests, or managing an interest profile (that's Research Agent)

crons.description: Every 10 minutes — pull new Gmail / Calendar / Drive items into IntakeQueue and poll Zoom for new recordings.
6am daily — regenerate Current_State.md on Drive so the goals/projects/tasks tree is browsable.
7am daily — draft the morning brief (calendar, tasks, follow-ups) into Drive.
9am Monday — generate commitment nudge drafts for stakeholders the user owes a follow-up.

agents.name: CFO
agents.purpose: Owns bookkeeping, budgeting, cash-flow, retirement and financial planning, and tax prep/advice. Hybrid agent: SPA + REST for bulk ops (imports, review, reports) and MCP tools for conversational use from Claude.ai.

examples: Import last month's transactions from Teller
Categorize these transactions for Schedule C
What's my burn rate this quarter?
Am I on track for my retirement goal?
Set a $500/mo dining budget and track against it
How much should I pay in estimated taxes this quarter?
nonGoals: Calendar, tasks, goals, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Building or modifying other agents
Generic customer-facing financial advice for third parties
Executing trades or moving money

crons.description: Nightly Teller transaction sync (~05:00 ET) — pulls and stages new transactions for review.
Every 30 min — SMS dispatcher; self-checks Pacific local time + per-person preferred slots so 47 of 48 daily fires are no-ops.

agents.name: Guest Booking
agents.purpose: Manages guest bookings across Airbnb, VRBO, and Booking.com — audits listing consistency across platforms (price, terms, photos, descriptions, titles) and manages overlapping-inventory availability using a graph-based containment/conflict model so that nested listing configurations (whole-house, partial-house, individual rooms) block each other correctly. Guesty is the current source of truth; the legacy booking-sync UI worker stays running until this agent reaches parity and will then be sunset.

examples: What bookings are checking in this week?
Sync my Airbnb calendar with VRBO
Block off next weekend across all platforms
Draft a check-in message for tomorrow's guest
Audit my listings for price and description divergence across platforms
Someone booked a single room — make sure the whole-house listing is blocked
nonGoals: Personal calendar, tasks, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Bookkeeping, budgeting, or tax work (that's CFO)
Building or modifying other agents
Host coaching or general hospitality advice
Dynamic pricing — this agent audits price consistency, it does not set prices

agents.name: LinkedIn Watcher
agents.purpose: Polls a watchlist of LinkedIn profiles daily via Proxycurl and feeds any new posts into Research Agent's knowledge base. Background feeder worker — not user-facing.

examples: Watch https://www.linkedin.com/in/kylelagunas for new posts
List the LinkedIn profiles I'm watching
Stop watching kylelagunas
Run the LinkedIn poll right now
nonGoals: Searching or synthesizing content (that's Research Agent)
Posting to LinkedIn or any social network
Pulling messages, connections, or non-post activity
Ephemeral profile reads for planning context (that's Chief of Staff's read_content)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)

crons.description: Daily at 7am Pacific — poll watched LinkedIn profiles via Proxycurl, dedupe, hand off new posts to Research Agent.

agents.name: Medium Watcher
agents.purpose: Polls Medium member RSS feeds daily, fetches each new article with the subscriber's cookie so member-only bodies come through, and forwards extracted content into Research Agent. Background feeder worker — not user-facing.

examples: Watch https://medium.com/feed/@danshipper
List the Medium feeds I'm watching
Stop watching @danshipper
Refresh my Medium cookie
nonGoals: Searching or synthesizing content (that's Research Agent)
Posting to Medium
Fetching member-only content for someone else's account
Discovering Medium feeds (you supply the URL)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)

crons.description: Daily at 7am Pacific — poll Medium member RSS, fetch each new article with subscriber cookie, hand off to Research Agent.

agents.name: Wired Watcher
agents.purpose: Polls Wired RSS feeds (sections, tags) daily, fetches each new article with the subscriber's cookie so paywalled bodies come through, and forwards extracted content into Research Agent. Background feeder worker — not user-facing.

examples: Watch https://www.wired.com/feed/category/business/rss
List the Wired feeds I'm watching
Stop watching category-business
Refresh my Wired cookie
nonGoals: Searching or synthesizing content (that's Research Agent)
Bypassing other Condé Nast paywalls (use a separate watcher per property)
Fetching paywalled content for someone else's account
Discovering Wired feeds (you supply the URL)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)

crons.description: Daily at 7:30am Pacific — poll Wired RSS, fetch each new article with subscriber cookie, hand off to Research Agent.

agents.name: Research Agent
agents.purpose: Personal knowledge base — ingests articles from Bluesky, email forwards, and manual bookmarks; retrieves content via semantic and full-text search; synthesizes grounded answers with citations; and curates ranked digests by interest profile.

triggerPhrases: add this to my knowledge base
examples: Ingest https://example.com/article and add it to my reading list
What have I saved about AI agents?
Generate a digest of what I've read in the last 24 hours
Search my knowledge base for articles about vector databases
Add the Bluesky feed @someaccount.bsky.social as a source
What does my research say about Cloudflare Workers?
nonGoals: Calendar, tasks, goals, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Sending emails or creating calendar events (that's Chief of Staff)
Ephemeral Drive doc or web page reads for planning context (that's Chief of Staff's read_content)
Financial accounting, bookkeeping, or tax work (that's CFO)
Guest booking or property management (that's Guest Booking)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)
Real-time web search — this agent searches ingested content only

crons.description: Every 5 minutes — re-check page-monitoring watches and notify on diffs.
Every 30 minutes — poll Bluesky source feeds and ingest new posts into the knowledge base.

agents.name: Graphic Designer
agents.purpose: Designs and produces visual artifacts — Google Slides from templates, Cloudflare Pages websites, logos and brand guides, image/icon sourcing, and brand-compliance audits.

examples: Build a pitch deck from this outline using my template
Design a logo for my new company
Build a landing page for the product launch and deploy it
Find me 5 icons that match our brand style for the services page
Check if this Google Doc follows our brand guidelines
Create a brand style guide to go with this logo
Iterate on logo concept #3 — make it more minimal
Update slide 4 to use a two-column layout with an image
nonGoals: Print design, packaging, or video/motion graphics (out of scope v1)
Long-form copywriting or content strategy (user provides the outline)
Calendar, tasks, goals, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Financial accounting, bookkeeping, or tax work (that's CFO)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)
Persistent article/knowledge ingestion (that's Research Agent)
Dynamic web apps with backends — this builds static Cloudflare Pages sites only
Guest booking or property management (that's Guest Booking)

agents.name: Termination Documentation
agents.purpose: Guides a California employee through documenting a possible wrongful-termination or hostile-workplace claim: interviews the user, builds an evidence checklist grounded in US and California employment law, tracks collection, ingests Claude.ai file uploads into an organized Google Drive folder, drafts a Google Docs evidence memo for counsel or HR, and walks through a 24-hour company-exit checklist.

examples: I think I'm about to be laid off in California — help me document it
Interview me about my situation and build a wrongful-termination evidence plan
I was fired after reporting harassment — what should I collect?
I'm uploading my offer letter, reviews, and Slack exports — file them in my case folder
Draft an evidence memo I can share with my employment lawyer
I have 24 hours with my work laptop — walk me through what to grab and what to leave
What's still missing from my evidence packet?
nonGoals: Giving legal advice, predicting claim outcomes, or representing the user
Filing DFEH/CRD or EEOC charges, or sending demand letters on the user's behalf
Negotiating severance or drafting settlement demands
Advising the user to remove employer-confidential or trade-secret material from company systems
Contacting witnesses, coworkers, HR, or employer counsel on the user's behalf
Personal productivity, calendar, tasks, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Severance tax planning, 401(k) rollover modeling, or bookkeeping (that's CFO)
Persistent article ingestion or research-corpus search (that's Research Agent)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)
Employment law outside California / US federal law

agents.name: Shopping Price Tracker
agents.purpose: Tracks daily prices for products and airline tickets via Claude API web_search, eBay Browse API, a JSON-LD URL-watch scraper, and Facebook Marketplace via secondhandmcp.com. Auto-discovers retailer URLs on intake; emails a daily digest so the user can decide when to buy.

examples: Track Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones with a $280 target
Watch flights JFK to LIS, depart May 15-22, return June 1-8, max $700
What's the latest digest?
nonGoals: Auto-purchasing items or executing checkout
Ingesting purchase history (that's CFO's amazon-import)
General page-content monitoring (that's Research Agent's manage_watches)
Calendar, tasks, goals, or stakeholder management (that's Chief of Staff)
Building or modifying other agents (that's Agent Builder)

crons.description: Daily at 12:00 UTC (08:00 ET during EDT) — search every tracked item, build the digest, send the digest email.
Every 4 hours — re-search only priority='high' items so urgent prices stay fresh; never sends email.
